title: 26-033 - USA v. Hackett
text:
Case 1:26-mj-00033-EPG Document 4 Filed 04/10/26 Page 1 of 1
IN THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT
EASTERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA
UNITED STATES OF AMERICA,
(cid:3) (cid:3) (cid:3) (cid:3)(cid:3)(cid:3)(cid:3)(cid:3)(cid:3)(cid:3)Plaintiff,
v. Case No: 1:26-mj-0003(cid:22)-EPG
(cid:48)(cid:36)(cid:56)(cid:53)(cid:44)(cid:38)(cid:40)(cid:3)(cid:43)(cid:36)(cid:38)(cid:46)(cid:40)(cid:55)(cid:55)
Defendant.
APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF HABEAS CORPUS
The undersigned attorney hereby applies to the Court for the issuance of a writ of habeas corpus
(cid:1800)Ad Prosequendum (cid:1798)Ad Testificandum
Name of Detainee: (cid:48)(cid:68)(cid:88)(cid:85)(cid:76)(cid:70)(cid:72)(cid:3)(cid:43)(cid:68)(cid:70)(cid:78)(cid:72)(cid:87)(cid:87), Booking Number 261(cid:25)(cid:23)(cid:26)(cid:20)
Detained at Fresno County Jail
Detainee is: a.) (cid:1800)charged in this district by: (cid:1798) Indictment (cid:1798) Information (cid:1800) Complaint
charging detainee with: Felon in Possession of Ammunition 18 U.S.C. § 922(g)(1)
or b.) (cid:1798)a witness not otherwise available by ordinary process of the Court
Detainee will: a.) (cid:1798)return to the custody of detaining facility upon termination of proceedings
or b.) (cid:1800) be retained in federal custody until final disposition of federal charges
Appearance is necessary FORTHWITH in the Eastern District of California.
Signature: /s/ (cid:53)(cid:82)(cid:69)(cid:72)(cid:85)(cid:87)(cid:3)(cid:47)(cid:17)(cid:3)(cid:57)(cid:72)(cid:81)(cid:72)(cid:80)(cid:68)(cid:81)(cid:16)(cid:43)(cid:88)(cid:74)(cid:75)(cid:72)(cid:86)
Printed Name & Phone No: (cid:53)(cid:82)(cid:69)(cid:72)(cid:85)(cid:87)(cid:3)(cid:57)(cid:72)(cid:81)(cid:72)(cid:80)(cid:68)(cid:81)(cid:16)(cid:43)(cid:88)(cid:74)(cid:75)(cid:72)(cid:86)(cid:15)(cid:3)(cid:24)(cid:24)(cid:28)(cid:16)(cid:22)(cid:27)(cid:27)(cid:16)(cid:20)(cid:24)(cid:20)(cid:25)
Attorney of Record for: United States of America
WRIT OF HABEAS CORPUS
(cid:1800)Ad Prosequendum (cid:1798)Ad Testificandum
The above application is granted and the above-named custodian, as well as the United States Marshal’s Service
or any Federal Agent for this district, is hereby ORDERED to produce the named detainee, as soon as practicable, for
arraignment on the Complaint and prosecution in the above-captioned case in the Eastern District of California.
Dated: Apr 9, 2026
HONORABLE STANLEY A. BOONE
U.S. MAGISTRATE JUDGE
Please provide the following, if known:
AKA(s) (cid:48)(cid:68)(cid:88)(cid:85)(cid:76)(cid:70)(cid:72)(cid:3)(cid:43)(cid:68)(cid:70)(cid:78)(cid:72)(cid:87)(cid:87)
Booking or CDC #: Booking Number 261(cid:25)(cid:23)(cid:26)(cid:20)
Facility Address: 1225 M Street, Fresno, CA 93721
Facility Phone: (559)600-8440
Currently Fresno County Jail
RETURN OF SERVICE
Executed on:
(signature)
